# mcp.umin.ai | uminai MCP (Model Context Protocol) Servers Directory

> #1 Largest curated collection of MCP Servers, including Awesome MCP Servers and tutorial for LLM integration. Extend your MCP servers to enhance your AI capabilities through our search and discovery.

## Headline
- Building Connected Intelligence on umin.ai

# Purpose
- uminai MCP Servers Directory is a curated list of MCP Server integration for your AI/LLM to extend its capabilities. uminai MCP site list from featured and open source of MCPs for all use cases that suits for end users

## Pages
- [Home](https://mcp.umin.ai): #1 Largest curated collection of MCP Servers, including Awesome MCP Servers and tutorial for LLM integration. Extend your MCP servers to enhance your AI capabilities through our search and discovery.
- [Explore MCP Servers](https://mcp.umin.ai/explore): Discover one of the largest collections of Model Context Protocol servers on uminai.
- [Terms of Service](https://mcp.umin.ai/terms-of-service): Terms of service for the mcp.umin.ai directory of Model Context Protocol servers.
- [Privacy Policy](https://mcp.umin.ai/privacy-policy): Learn how mcp.umin.ai collects, uses, and safeguards your data.

## Key Features
- Create and submit open source or official MCP on uminai MCP Directory
- Get featured and stand out among the community
- Web3 integration for secure privacy of LLM and MCP interactions
- uminai Chat AI for testing and as a playground as Zapier-like workflow to suit automation needs and more!

## /server pages
- [Mercado Pago](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mercado_pago): Mercado Pago’s official MCP server for simplified API interaction and product integration.
- [MCP Toolbox for Databases](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mcp_toolbox_databases): Open-source MCP server with fast, secure tools for databases (by Google).
- [Mailtrap](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mailtrap): Integrate with Mailtrap Email API.
- [JetBrains](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/jetbrains): Work on your code with JetBrains IDEs.
- [Kagi Search](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/kagi_search): Search the web through Kagi’s search API.
- [Needle](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/needle): Production-ready RAG to search and retrieve data from your documents.
- [Keboola](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/keboola): Build robust data workflows, integrations, and analytics on one intuitive platform.
- [Logfire](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/logfire): Access OpenTelemetry traces and metrics through Logfire.
- [Last9](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/last9): Bring real-time production context—logs, metrics, traces—into your local env to auto-fix code faster.
- [Mailgun](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mailgun): Interact programmatically with the Mailgun API.
- [Langfuse Prompt Management](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/langfuse): Open-source tool for collaborative editing, versioning, evaluating, and releasing prompts.
- [Mapbox](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mapbox): Unlock geospatial intelligence through Mapbox APIs (geocoding, POI search, directions, isochrones, and more).
- [Mastra Docs MCP](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/mastra_docs_server): Provides AI assistants with direct access to Mastra.ai’s complete knowledge base.
- [LINE Official Account](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/line_official_account): Integrate the LINE Messaging API to connect an AI agent to a LINE Official Account.
- [Agentset](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/agentset): RAG MCP for your Agentset data.
- [Make](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/make): Turn your Make scenarios into callable tools for AI assistants.
- [Metoro](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/metoro): Query and interact with Kubernetes environments monitored by Metoro.
- [Neon](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/neon): Interact with the Neon serverless Postgres platform.
- [Airtable](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/airtable): Read and write access to Airtable databases.
- [Meilisearch](https://mcp.umin.ai/server/meilisearch): Interact and query with Meilisearch full-text & semantic-search API.

## Sitemap
- https://mcp.umin.ai/sitemap.xml
- https://mcp.umin.ai/sitemap-0.xml

- en_US
